title: sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat
description:
This is a continuation of sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat. In the current window, the SM persona produced two additional back-to-back failed runs at 2026-05-29T01:16:51.627957+00:00 and 2026-05-29T01:16:51.646047+00:00, both with explicit truncation signatures in the error text: `json parse failed ... finish_reason=length`. The failures occurred immediately after a successful SM run and before the next SM attempt recovered, so the pattern remains active rather than historical.

The evidence continues to point to a factory-side output-capping problem rather than a story-specific domain failure. One failed run reports `max_tokens=65536 finish_reason=length` with `tokens_out=122880`, and the next reports the same parse-failure shape at `max_tokens=8192 finish_reason=length`. The watcher note also reports that these failures extend the previously escalated pattern from prior intervals, while the other failures in this window are fast sandbox-style test failures with ambiguous or missing error text.

Immediate downstream impact in this specific window is limited because the SM recovered on the next attempt and the failed runs show `cost_usd=0.0` here. However, the pattern has now persisted across multiple watcher-note intervals and remains clearly diagnosable from the error text itself. That combination keeps this at investigation level: the factory is still operating, but the recurring SM truncation behavior is unresolved and liable to keep reappearing until judged by L3.

evidence.summary_excerpt: The previously escalated SM truncation pattern continued immediately: two more `finish_reason=length` JSON-parse failures occurred back-to-back before the next SM attempt recovered.

evidence.excerpt: persona=sm attempt_n=812 success=false error="json parse failed at max_tokens=65536 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 9 (char 8)" tokens_out=122880 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat

persona=sm attempt_n=813 success=false error="json parse failed at max_tokens=8192 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 7 (char 6)" tokens_out=20 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat

{"noteworthy":"Seven failed runs were recorded: five fast sandbox-style failures with generic or missing error text, plus two SM failures whose error text explicitly identifies output truncation at `finish_reason=length`."}

{"noteworthy":"Onboarder hit a retry storm with 3 failures in the window, and SM had 2 immediate repeat failures; the onboarder errors are ambiguous, while the SM pair matches the ongoing diagnosable truncation pattern."}

escalation_reason: Recurring SM output truncation has persisted across multiple watcher-note intervals, including two more explicit `finish_reason=length` JSON-parse failures in this window at 2026-05-29T01:16:51.627957+00:00 and 2026-05-29T01:16:51.646047+00:00. L3 judgment is needed because the pattern is clearly attributable to factory/model output settings rather than story logic, remains unresolved despite intermittent recovery, and has now repeated across several consecutive intervals.
